metadata.name: Provide Product UPC Codes to a Retailer

description: A retailer needs a list of all Universal Product Codes (UPCs) for the products they carry to set them up in their point-of-sale system.

nodes.task_description: Identify the retailer and the list of products they have purchased.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent gets a list of all products the retailer stocks.

nodes.task_description: For each product, retrieve its UPC code from the product database.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent compiles a list of all the required UPCs.

nodes.task_description: Send the list of UPCs to the retailer.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent provides the retailer with the requested data.
